baseline_solo.reasoning_summary: CKPT exhibits severe fundamental distress (negative equity, zero revenue, persistent losses) in an overheat macro regime. No catalyst or corroborating alt-data supports either a surge-short or quality-long thesis. Alternative data is sparse (wikipedia pageviews only, no industry-specific signals). Information integrity assessment explicitly forbids use as primary signal. Analyst sentiment is descriptor-only and cannot override missing fundamentals. Insufficient evidence and missing critical corroboration blocks both surge-short and quality-long sleeve eligibility.

baseline_solo.reason: Insufficient evidence and missing critical corroboration. Fundamental distress (negative equity, zero revenue, persistent losses) is real but not paired with credible catalyst or alt-data verification. Information integrity assessment forbids primary-signal use. Surge-short sleeve requires both catalyst AND corroboration; quality-long sleeve requires quality fundamentals. Neither threshold met. Fail-closed to no_trade pending alt-data wiring and narrative assessment.

decision_log: T0: Envelope validation passed. decision_timestamp=2025-03-10T09:30:00-04:00, lookahead_safe=true, data_after_cutoff_used=false.
T1: Macro regime assessed as overheat with stress_score=2. Equity discipline strict_quality_and_valuation_caution. Equity allocation cap 20%.
T2: Fundamental snapshot Q3 2024 (PIT-safe): revenue=0, net_income=-9.7M, operating_income=-9.7M, equity=-12.6M. Severe distress signal.
T3: Valuation snapshot TTM (not PIT-safe): PE=-0.06, PB=0.16, EV/EBITDA=-8.37. All metrics distressed or inverted.
T4: Price snapshot: last_eod_close=2.47 (2025-03-07), 5d return=-13.6%, 20d return=-30.0%, 60d return=-41.3%. Downtrend confirmed.
T5: News event summary: status=data_unavailable, items_count=0 within cutoff. No catalyst identified. 20 items dropped post-cutoff.
T6: Alternative data features: wikipedia_pageviews only (30 rows, low attention). Industry-specific adapters not_wired. GitHub unmapped_ticker. SEC adapters failed (cik_not_found).
T7: Information integrity assessment: status=insufficient_evidence, use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false. Tier distribution T1=0 T2=0 T3=1 T4=1. Corroboration_status=uncorroborated.
T8: Sentiment/ownership evidence: analyst_ratings descriptor-only (1 SB, 2 B, 2 H as of 2025-03-01). Ownership_positioning not_evaluated. Community_size not_evaluated.
T9: Corporate calendar: no upcoming earnings. Past earnings all negative EPS. No dividend or split events near decision.
T10: Filing confirmation: status=not_evaluated. sec_edgar cik_not_found. sec_form4 cik_not_found. No 8-K rows available.
T11: Narrative price gap assessment: status=not_evaluated, agent_internal_pending. Cannot assess price decline vs. news disconnect.
T12: Surge-short sleeve check: requires (1) catalyst + (2) corroboration. Catalyst absent (no news). Corroboration absent (alt-data limited, information_integrity_veto tripped). FAIL surge-short.

T13: Quality-long sleeve check: requires (1) quality fundamentals + (2) macro fit. Fundamentals distressed (negative equity, zero revenue). Macro regime strict_quality_and_valuation_caution. FAIL quality-long.

T14: Veto conditions: insufficient_evidence=true (missing alt-data, narrative, filing, ownership). missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance=true (narrative_price_gap, filing_confirmation, ownership_positioning all not_evaluated). information_integrity_veto=true (use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false). lookahead_data_used=false (safe).
T15: Decision rule: multiple veto conditions tripped. Fail-closed to no_trade. position_size_pct=0.0.
